_comment: PROJECT-SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION — new users: fill in YOUR values here. This file is gitignored (orchestrator_project.local.json).
service_account_json_comment: Path to Google Cloud service account JSON key file. Download from your GCP project Console.
spreadsheet_id_comment: Google Sheet ID from the sheet URL. Format: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/[THIS_ID]/...
email_account_comment: Gmail mailbox for IMAP login (inbound email scanning). Set via env var GLASS_EMAIL_ACCOUNT or here.
email_password_comment: Gmail app password (not regular password). Set via env var GLASS_EMAIL_PASSWORD or here. Keep empty if using env var.
sender_address_comment: From address for notification emails. Typically same as email_account. Set via env var GLASS_SENDER or here.
target_sender_comment: Email address to monitor for inbound scan data. Typically the Orca Scan export address.
location_comment: Site/location code appended to all output rows. Examples: APO, BOS, ATL. Change per deployment.
notify_recipients_comment: Array of email addresses to notify when replacements are found. Set via env var GLASS_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS (comma-separated) or here.
